prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all C++ source files in envoyproxy/envoy that implement the hot restart mechanism: the HotRestart interface, the parent/child process handshake, the socket passing via Unix domain sockets, the drain sequence, and the child process readiness signaling.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the envoy-service-mesh fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all C++ source files in envoyproxy/envoy that implement the hot restart mechanism: the HotRestart interface, the parent/child process handshake, the socket passing via Unix domain sockets, the drain sequence, and the child process readiness signaling.
